# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **m151 engine sync and fixes**

## Highlights

Merges upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and resolves a native resource leak in SKImage.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged** — Pulls in the latest chrome/m151 upstream bug fixes, keeping the bundled renderer aligned with the Chromium milestone 151 branch. ([#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData** — Calling SKImage.FromEncodedData with an SKRectI subset no longer leaks the underlying native image handle when the subset operation fails or the result is discarded. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
